name: Low Stock Alerts
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Maropost"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Add-ons and Integrations built in-house by Maropost are documented and supported by our customer service team. If you're having issues with this integration, "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/support/s/ask-us", "children": [{"text": "let us know"}]}, {"text": "!"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Always stay abreast of stock that is getting low by receiving timely notifications when product inventory reaches a defined level."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up Low Stock Alerts"}], "data-id": "setup-instructions"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To install and set up the Low Stock Alerts add-on:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Addons", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Find the "}, {"text": "Low Stock Alerts", "bold": true}, {"text": " add-on and click the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Restock Qty"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Reorder Qty"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Restock Warning Level"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Products will now have additional fields to configure the stock levels when alerts occur:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Populate these fields for individual products or in bulk using the "}, {"text": "import wizard"}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once the stock on hand reaches these levels, the product will appear on the Inventory Restock Report which is accessed from the "}, {"text": "Reports", "bold": true}, {"text": " menu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to the "}, {"text": "Webstore", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Webstore Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": " page."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In the out of stock warnings section, enable the alerts you would like to receive."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Check that the system email address to receive these emails is correct in the "}, {"text": "Settings & Tools", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Business Details", "bold": true}, {"text": " page."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
